title: MD
biography: Ben Carson is an American neurosurgeon who performed the first successful separation of conjoined twins joined at the back of the head in 1987. He was a pioneering pediatric neurosurgeon at Johns Hopkins.
aiSummary: Ben Carson is a neurosurgery specialist at Johns Hopkins Hospital. Based in Baltimore.
